phrase: You MUST call `agr_curation_query` before returning any ontology validation result.
synonyms: call at least one of agr_curation_query before final output
reason: OTV-RTC / OTV-03 de-dup. The pre-rewrite '# Tool Requirement' restated the required-tool-call imperative that the locked Generated Runtime Contract already injects ('Required tool-call policy: call at least one of agr_curation_query before final output'). The lean rewrite drops the base imperative and folds the curator-facing rule into <goal> once ('call `agr_curation_query` before reporting any ontology fact'); the machine imperative survives in the core half of the assembled render. The literal `agr_curation_query` token is still present in the base prompt.

phrase: Validate ontology-backed fields from a `DomainValidationRequest` and return structured `OntologyTermValidationResult` data using the shared validator result contract. Resolve only from tool evidence.
synonyms: produce JSON matching OntologyTermValidationResult; the structured-output layer below is authoritative for final response shape
reason: OTV-OUT / OTV-02 output-mandate de-dup. The pre-rewrite '# Goal' carried the 'return structured OntologyTermValidationResult data / structured-output' mandate that the locked core already injects ('Output contract from agent.yaml: produce JSON matching OntologyTermValidationResult; the structured-output layer below is authoritative for final response shape' plus the CRITICAL structured-output block 'Your final response MUST be valid JSON matching the OntologyTermValidationResult schema EXACTLY'). The lean rewrite no longer restates the JSON-only output mandate; the core half of the render owns it. The home check is satisfied by the synonym (the core's injected output-contract line); the ontology root-field detail is KEPT in <result_contract> because the core does not enumerate it. The exact phrase still appears in <goal> (the curator-facing one-line restatement), and the `OntologyTermValidationResult` token plus the 'do not wrap them under another object' rule remain in the base prompt.
